title: Auto-highlight alignment + Highlights with Structure Nodes download
description:
DB3 auto-generated highlight paths now use the same page-anchored line builder as manual highlight drawing (planBoardBuildAnchoredLinesFromWorldStroke), so segment lines land on structure nodes correctly.

Download plans on map PDFs with structure nodes now shows a fourth option: Highlights with Structure Nodes — flat baked highlights plus node markers using the same rx/ry → PDF coordinate mapping as normal highlights.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg53).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Auto-highlight: same anchoring path as manual highlight tool.
Download: dynamic Highlights with Structure Nodes option when map has nodes.
Structure node PDF bake uses planPdfAnchoredPointToPdfUser (shared with highlights).
